However, Model 1 completely rewrote the content into a semi-classical/formal style: '您的建议，我已悉数收悉，深感其价值，定当慎重思量...'. Regarding the paralinguistic feature '优雅克制' (Elegant and Restrained), the delivery is highly dramatic, performative, and somewhat exaggerated (00:00-00:09). model_comparison: Model 1 fails strictly on Content Accuracy by completely hallucinating a new script instead of reading the provided text. This automatic failure (Score 0) makes it unusable for the specific command. Model 2 preserves the semantic meaning and adheres to the script with only minor lexical substitutions. Furthermore, Model 2's paralinguistic performance is superior for the prompt 'Restrained' (克制); it is calm and professional, whereas Model 1 is overly dramatic and performative. Therefore, Model 2 is the clear winner.
